aboutUs.title: Architecting the Future of Estimation
aboutUs.subtitle: APEX was born from a simple observation: AEC calculation tools haven't kept pace with modern complexity.
aboutUs.missionDesc: To provide engineers and architects with the absolute precision they need to bring world-class infrastructure to life.
aboutUs.storyDesc: Founded in 2018, we set out to build more than just a spreadsheet. We built an engine—a powerful, multi-dimensional logic processor that understands the nuance of structural engineering.
aboutUs.coreLogicDesc: The principles that drive every line of code in the APEX Engine.
aboutUs.joinUs: We're always looking for brilliant minds in AEC and Computer Science.

values.precisionDesc: Every calculation is verified against structural logic patterns to ensure absolute data integrity.
values.flexibilityDesc: A recursive engine architecture that adapts to any project scale, from residential to urban infrastructure.
values.innovationDesc: Deploying the latest in reactive computation and AI-augmented logic to automate tedious surveyed data.

faq.title: Technical Insights
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the APEX calculation engine.
faq.q1: How does the formula evaluation work?
faq.a1: Our engine parses mathematical expressions in real-time, mapping field variables (like length, depth, height) to their specific category definitions for instant results.
faq.q2: Can I define custom units for finishing works?
faq.a2: Absolutely. The platform supports arbitrary unit definitions, allowing you to track everything from linear meters of cabling to metric tons of reinforced concrete.
faq.q3: Is the system compatible with existing Revit or CAD exports?
faq.a3: Yes. APEX is designed to be the logic layer that sits after your design phase, accepting structural data for comprehensive cost and quantity analysis.
